title: Multi Mod
description: This mod was created with ideas of my Telegram followers
body:
I created this mod with ideas of my followers. It contains such ideas as acorns, collar of undying, mosquitos and much more.

# Added features
- Mosquito (spawns in swamp, hostile)
  
- Freezombe (just like regular zombie, but adds slowness after punch)
  
- Old Illager (spawns in house in plains, neutral)
- Old Ravager (spawns in house with Old Illager, neutral, you can buy some items)
  
- Empty Tree (spawns in desert and badlands, contains Empty Logs)
- Empty Log (drops Empty Bark)
- Empty Bark (you can use it to craft Empty Log and to repair your shield)

- Chestplate with pockets (it doesn't work)

- Netherite Book (just like regular book, but with fire resistance)

- Acorn (drops from oak leaves, can be cooked in furnace and campfire)
- Cooked Acorn (food)
- Acorn Block (can be crafted from acorns)
- Hog (neutral, can be breeded with Acorn Block, drops porkchop, acorns and hog tooth)
- Hog Tooth 
- Tooth Sword (can be crafted from Hog Teeth)
- Tooth Arrow (can be crafted from Hog Teeth)

- Collar of Undying (just like Totem of Undying, but for mobs)
